calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Patricia Abalos #13128 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner, Kristina Webster Svendsen, is present in propria persona.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name. Kristina Webster Svendsen is sworn and examined by the Court.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the proposed change of name made at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Kristina Svendsen Landry. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.
